BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: update social interaction status to cancelled

INVOKE.COMMENT: save updated social interactio to DB

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update social interactions data to DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: update social interaction status to cancelled

INVOKE.COMMENT: save updated social interactio to DB

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update social interactions data to DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.COMMENT: get if any future social interaction with status suspended

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
MAP.COMMENT: api call is success and future social interaction exists

MAP.NAME: %responseListSize%==0&&%results/status%=='200'
MAP.COMMENT: api call is success but no future social interaction exists, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to get social interactions data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: update future social interaction's status to cancelled and effective to date accordingly

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update future social interaction's data to DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: social interaction is not cancelled, go ahead and cancel

MAP.COMMENT: challengeId exists, continue with rest of the logic

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Deleting social interaction %socialInteractions/socialInteractionId% have failed since the Challenge ID dosen't exist.

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.COMMENT: get current challenge periods for challengeId

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if api call is success and current challenge period exists

MAP.COMMENT: map cutoffDay as effective request date
compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: cutoffDay cannot be determined, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: cutoffDay cannot be determined, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
INVOKE.COMMENT: no current challenge periods, throw error

MAP.COMMENT: calculate social interactions new effective to date

INVOKE.COMMENT: update current social interaction with new effective to date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: create future social interaction and cleanup

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-1294 extracted all members by adding large pageLimit--- get all social interactions members data using current social interactions id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %results/total%>0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success, social interactions members data retrieved successfully

MAP.COMMENT: drop unwanted variables from future social interactions members

INVOKE.COMMENT: save new future socialInteraction and its members

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to create future social interaction and its members data to DB. Error: %results/message%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: %results/total%==0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success, no social interactions members
